entry.title: IDC W58RGZ19D0110 (P00011) awarded to NORTHROP GRUMMAN SYSTEMS CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: MOD TO RECEIVE ALL GFP LISTS FROM 15-C-0067, 16-C-0030 AND 18-C-0035 ONTO W58RGZ-19-D-0110 AND CHANGE ATTCH 0014 TO A CONSOLIDATED GFP LIST.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: ASSEMBLIES INTERCHANGEABLE BETWEEN WEAPONS IN TWO OR MORE CLASSES

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: SEARCH, DETECTION, NAVIGATION, GUIDANCE, AERONAUTICAL, AND NAUTICAL SYSTEM AND INSTRUMENT MANUFACTURING

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W58RGZ19D0110 (P00012) awarded to NORTHROP GRUMMAN SYSTEMS CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: INCREASE B-KIT QUANTITY AMOUNT BY 104 UNITS FROM 180 TO 284 B-KITS. INCREASE THE CONTRACT CEILING AMOUNT BY $127,182,120, FROM $481,576,687 TO $608,758,807.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: ASSEMBLIES INTERCHANGEABLE BETWEEN WEAPONS IN TWO OR MORE CLASSES
